Tests object creation and type assertion in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates the creation and type checking of a JavaScript object. It declares a variable `a` and assigns it an empty object using the `Object()` constructor. The script then uses an `assert` statement to verify that the type of `a` is `'object'`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on object creation and type validation in JavaScript.
